resources.string: An open-source sync server for Octi made by this app\'s developer. Data is encrypted client-side, only your devices can decrypt it.\n\nAs both the app and the server are still being improved, it may be less stable than other sync options.
Inactive accounts are deleted after a few weeks.
You will need access to another device that is already linked.
Octi Server is an open-source sync server for Octi by darken.
Clear device\'s data on this account. Devices stay linked but their stored data is removed.
This will remove this device from your account. If this is the last linked device, your account will be deleted.
Create a text code that you can send through other apps
A new device was linked to your account.
Manually copy and paste a link code
Scan a QR code from another device
This device is no longer registered on the server. Disconnect and re-link from another device, or create a new account.
New accounts use improved encryption. App versions older than %1$s cannot sync with new-style accounts.
This device may not support this account\'s encryption. Update the app on this device or recreate the account with legacy encryption.
File sharing needs updated encryption. Create a new account on one device without Legacy encryption, then link your other devices to it.
